inputMetrics: baseline checksum verified; route selected; no live PR mining
processContract: Bind the job to certified authority and select route/scope without LLM calls.
outputMetrics: schema_valid=true; route rationale present; SLA <= 20s
dirtyDataRules: missing authority proof; baseline checksum mismatch
notes: Contract active; fixture certification still pending.

processName: Story Seeds and Full Context Story Ledger
supplier: Phase 0 authority proof plus manuscript text
inputMetrics: seed output >= 500 words; 10 ledger layers attempted; 13 criteria scaffolded
processContract: Produce provisional story map, evaluation seed, and full-context story ledger.
outputMetrics: all 10 story layers present; seed_authority=seed_only; schema_valid=true
dirtyDataRules: malformed seed JSON; missing story ledger layer; unverified seed claims
notes: Cartel Babies used fallback seeds; robustness remains a gap.

supplier: Phase 0 authority proof plus manuscript and criteria canon
inputMetrics: evidence anchors available; candidate prose contract loaded
processContract: Produce provisional revise opportunities with A/B/C candidate prose.
outputRequiredFields: opportunity_id; criterion_key; evidence; candidate_a; candidate_b; candidate_c
outputMetrics: all opportunities evidence-anchored; A/B/C are manuscript-ready prose; A/B/C are materially distinct from one another
dirtyDataRules: generic opportunity; missing evidence anchor; A/B/C not prose; duplicate or near-duplicate A/B/C options
notes: Seed enriches Revise but evaluation evidence governs.

inputMetrics: seed schemas valid; required seed sections present
processContract: Block Phase 1A when seed artifacts are incomplete.
outputMetrics: missing sections detected; blocked/passed classified
dirtyDataRules: missing seed section; schema invalid
notes: Dirty seeds must kick back, not quietly degrade downstream.

inputMetrics: auth present; required fields complete; canonical job_type
processContract: Validate request and accept canonical job payload for queueing.
outputMetrics: ok=true response; trace id emitted
dirtyDataRules: ambiguous manuscript source; unauthenticated actor; non-canonical job type
notes: Need fuller input metrics for doc type, language, and mode.

inputMetrics: canonical status set only; DB write success
processContract: Persist queued job with canonical state and progress keys.
outputMetrics: status=queued; progress keys present
dirtyDataRules: non-canonical status; illegal transition
notes: JobStatus must remain queued|running|complete|failed only.

inputMetrics: single atomic claimant; worker_pulse_at set at claim time
processContract: Claim one eligible queued job with lease and heartbeat protection.
outputMetrics: exactly one active lease; split-brain prevented
dirtyDataRules: null worker_pulse_at; overlapping lease; non-production worker id
notes: Claim RPC migration addressed split-brain null pulse.

inputMetrics: text normalized; chunk strategy selected; non-empty chunk set
processContract: Create deterministic chunk/routing manifest for pass execution.
outputMetrics: stable boundaries; no hidden fallback path
dirtyDataRules: empty chunks for non-empty manuscript; route/type mismatch
notes: Short-form single-chunk synthesis recently fixed; keep route metrics explicit.

inputMetrics: timeout budget set; pass runner invoked
processContract: Extract story/craft signals without depending on Pass 2 output.
outputMetrics: parseable output; entity contamination rejected; ledger names canonical
dirtyDataRules: pseudo-entity contamination; malformed pass output; missing story layer
notes: Story ledger is truth for canonical names unless evidence proves otherwise.

inputMetrics: all visible layers classified; dirty layers suppressed/degraded
processContract: Classify story layers and block genuine benchmark failures.
outputMetrics: hard-fail triage complete; invalid hard-fails not promoted
dirtyDataRules: abandoned characters; canonical identity degraded; failed benchmark minimum
notes: Cartel Babies repair_required kicked forward; backward kick policy must be hardened later.

inputMetrics: all visible layers reviewed; comments for correction/reject
processContract: Persist accepted story ledger or route dirty layers back for repair.
outputMetrics: all visible layers have decisions; failed layers excluded
dirtyDataRules: auto-accepted degraded ledger; review gate bypassed on long-form hard fail
notes: Accepted ledger must be built through storyLedgerApprovalNormalizer.

inputMetrics: no Pass 1 payload as input; independence guard active
processContract: Produce independent craft diagnosis and candidate recommendations.
outputMetrics: output parseable; lexical independence passes
dirtyDataRules: Pass 1 contamination; generic recommendations; malformed output
notes: Independence is mandatory.

inputMetrics: no scaffold residue; complete sentences; evidence anchors present
processContract: Run the deterministic prose-quality gate before persisting the canonical Pass 1/2 handoff. Persist the exact pass1Output/pass2Output content contract consumed by Phase 3; review_gate_passed_at and the handoff presence/shape guard remain mandatory transition authorities.
outputMetrics: schema_version = pass12_handoff_v1; Pass 1 and Pass 2 payloads present; all prose checks pass or remain within the governed warning threshold; review gate authority verified before write; source-aware kick owner recorded
backwardKick: S05_PASS1 or S06_PASS2 based on source defect
dirtyDataRules: schema_version mismatch; missing Pass 1 or Pass 2 payload; scaffold residue; broken modal; generic language; missing evidence anchor
notes: Highest-risk seam defense.

inputMetrics: schema_version = pass12_handoff_v1; Pass 1 and Pass 2 payloads present; upstream passes succeeded; convergence input consistency
processContract: Synthesize final evaluation while preserving evidence, specificity, score hierarchy, and ledger name authority.
outputMetrics: no generic recommendations; banned names absent; score-10 rec suppression; every scored criterion has a recommendation or valid governed disposition; recommendation/status cardinality contradictions = 0
dirtyDataRules: missing overview field; banned character name; generic prescription; duplicate strategic lever; scored criterion lacks recommendations and a governed disposition; recommendation cardinality contradicts explicit recommendation_status; unknown recommendation_status or required rationale missing; long-form artifact terms in short-form output (WAVE / Golden Spine / Phase 5); internal pipeline process labels in user-facing text; whole-manuscript claim unsupportable from submitted excerpt; mid-sentence author-facing prose; short-form copy defect; recommendation field integrity defect
failureCodes: PASS3_TIMEOUT; PASS3_FAILED; REC_INTEGRITY_GENERIC; REC_INTEGRITY_NO_EVIDENCE; CRITERION_OPPORTUNITY_COVERAGE_INVALID; TEMPLATE_COMPLETENESS_GATE_FAILED; SHORT_FORM_LONGFORM_ARTIFACT_LEAK; SHORT_FORM_INTERNAL_PROCESS_LEAK; SHORT_FORM_UNSUPPORTED_GLOBAL_CLAIM; SHORT_FORM_MIDSENTENCE_TERMINATION; SHORT_FORM_COPY_DEFECT; HANDOFF_MIDSENTENCE_TERMINATION; REC_INTEGRITY_LOWERCASE_OPENING; REC_INTEGRITY_FUSED_FIELDS
notes: No malformed or generic recommendation may reach author-facing output. Recommendation cardinality and explicit disposition metadata must agree per criterion. Diagnostic confidence and evidence counts remain observational and never grant admission authority. Coverage contradictions kick back under a specific failure code; unrelated template defects remain terminal.

inputMetrics: canonical criterion keys preserved; score/null semantics preserved
processContract: Normalize synthesis into canonical evaluation_result_v2.
outputMetrics: 13 criteria coherent; score range valid; entity contamination rejected
dirtyDataRules: missing criterion; score range invalid; banned entity contamination; field undefined where required
consumers: S09_QUALITYGATEV2; S11a_RENDERER_WEBPAGE; S11b_DOWNLOAD_PIPELINE; ADJACENT_WAVE; ADJACENT_DREAM; ADJACENT_REVISION_LEDGER
notes: This is the canonical evaluation payload; no renderer may bypass it.

inputMetrics: deterministic checks executed; gate decision available
processContract: Fail closed on deterministic evaluation defects.
outputMetrics: failed checks emitted; no bypass by confidence
backwardKick: S07_PASS3 or S08_ER2_NORMALIZATION based on defect
dirtyDataRules: duplicate rec; generic rec; low evidence coverage; criteria mismatch
notes: Detection without enforcement is a defect.

inputMetrics: no persist if gate fails; atomic RPC available
processContract: Persist canonical evaluation artifact and terminal job state atomically.
outputMetrics: artifact ID returned; terminal status canonical; SIPOC artifact completeness and accuracy metrics emitted
dirtyDataRules: gate failed but persist attempted; artifact validation failed
notes: No artifact persists after failed deterministic gate.

inputMetrics: 13 criteria present; at least one score <= 9 for non-empty derivation
processContract: Derive manuscript-specific wave plan from canonical criterion keys with score-aware filtering.
outputMetrics: derived_wave_ids non-empty when findings exist; no generic fallback when bridge applies
dirtyDataRules: NO_DERIVED_WAVES_FROM_PASS3_FINDINGS; generic fallback only
notes: PR #1108 fixed criterion bridge; registry preserves acceptance metrics.

processName: Gate 15, Golden Spine, Dialogue Canon, Revision Canon Metadata
inputMetrics: text non-empty; criteria keys extractable; word count known
processContract: Run manuscript-scale governance audits and persist all governance artifacts.
outputMetrics: Gate 15 status determined; dialogue count proportional; golden spine surfaced
dirtyDataRules: Gate 15 FAIL; dialogue detector impossible count; weak continuity hidden
notes: Cartel Babies proved detector and enforcement gaps.

inputArtifacts: evaluation_result_v2; phase1a_chunk_routing_manifest_v1; wave_revision_plan_v1; gate_15_audit_v1; golden_spine_v1; dialogue_canon_audit_v1
inputMetrics: evaluation_result_v2 present; chunks loadable; no existing longform_document_v1
processContract: Produce long-form narrative synthesis without diverging from canonical evaluation data.
outputMetrics: non-empty document; canonical score/genre parity; no banned-name contamination
dirtyDataRules: DREAM score drift; DREAM genre drift; banned name contamination; score-10 shopping list
notes: DREAM may enrich, but it must not become a competing evaluation source.

inputArtifacts: evaluation_result_v2; longform_document_v1; wave_revision_plan_v1; gate_15_audit_v1; golden_spine_v1; dialogue_canon_audit_v1; revision_canon_metadata_v1
inputMetrics: DREAM persisted before audit; hard-required artifacts present
processContract: Determine last-mile releasability from complete artifact set.
outputMetrics: verdict PASS/WARN for releasable reports; missing_required_artifacts empty
dirtyDataRules: BLOCK verdict; missing DREAM; contradiction detected; low coverage
notes: PR #1109 fixed false BLOCK; BLOCK enforcement remains pending.

supplier: Canonical evaluation artifact, active evaluation template contract, audits, constitutional authority registry, and renderer manifest
inputArtifacts: evaluation_result_v2; evaluation_template_contract_v1; final_external_audit_v1; gate_15_audit_v1; dialogue_canon_audit_v1; wave_revision_plan_v1; longform_document_v1
inputRequiredFields: active_template_contract; canonical_view_model; audit_verdicts; renderer_parity_diagnostics; constitutional_authority_status; canonicalOpportunityLedger.opportunities; canonicalOpportunityLedger.disposition_contract_version; canonicalOpportunityLedger.source_identity_version; canonicalOpportunityLedger.forensics_contract_version; canonicalOpportunityLedger.source_recommendation_ids; canonicalOpportunityLedger.recommendation_dispositions
inputMetrics: all required artifacts present; active template path known; no blocking verdicts; renderer parity check complete; required constitutional authorities loaded; source_recommendation_count equals unique source identity count; disposition_count equals source_recommendation_count; disposition_coverage_ratio = 1; missing source identity count = 0; duplicate source identity count = 0; unexpected source identity count = 0; admitted_authority_coverage_ratio = 1; post_canonicalization_suppression_count derived from persisted dispositions; disposition_counts, validation_counts, governing_rule_counts, and criterion_disposition_counts exactly match persisted dispositions; suppressed/informational queue identity count = 0
processContract: Build and certify UnifiedEvaluationDocument against the active evaluation template before any author-visible renderer or Revise consumer may expose it. Every authoritative criterion recommendation receives exactly one governed disposition, but only admitted dispositions receive canonical queue identity. Recommendation lineage completeness never implies a minimum queue cardinality.
outputRequiredFields: active_template_path; unified_document_hash; decision; parity_results; dcip_compliance; blocking_reasons; certified_at
outputMetrics: template contract satisfied; score parity; genre parity; criteria parity; DCIP compliance; banned names=0; WAVE non-generic; recommendation lineage coverage = 100%; admitted_authority_coverage_ratio = 1; suppression forensics counters reconcile exactly to persisted lineage; canonical opportunity count is evidence-driven and may be zero
backwardKick: producer stage named by failed check
dirtyDataRules: webpage/download mismatch; missing/failing DCIP compliance; banned entity; Gate 15 FAIL; Final Audit BLOCK; dialogue detector impossible; canonical opportunity authority missing or malformed; unknown explicit recommendation disposition or suppression-forensics version; suppression-forensics counters differ from persisted dispositions; missing duplicate or unexpected recommendation source identity; source recommendation and disposition counts differ; admitted disposition lacks canonical opportunity identity; suppressed or informational disposition carries queue identity; held_recoverable used under recommendation_disposition_v1
failureCodes: PHASE5_TEMPLATE_CONTRACT_FAIL; PHASE5_RENDER_PARITY_FAIL; PHASE5_BANNED_ENTITY; PHASE5_SCORE_DRIFT; PHASE5_MISSING_AUDIT; PHASE5_UNCERTIFIED_OUTPUT
notes: Runtime gate is active on report page, report downloads, evaluation-result APIs, artifacts, report sharing, and Revise Workbench. Certification artifact validation fails closed; DB errors surface as system errors, not client/policy blocks. A present canonicalOpportunityLedger with opportunities: [] is valid governed authority; missing or malformed authority fails closed. recommendation_disposition_v1 permits admitted, suppressed_governed, and informational_non_actionable outcomes; held_recoverable is reserved vocabulary and rejected until a neutral recovery-authority proof exists. Missing disposition version remains legacy-readable while unknown explicit versions fail. DCIP compliance is required before exposure. Long-form-only inputs are required only when applicable by evaluation mode.

inputMetrics: UED certified; all sanitization applied internally; no renderer calculations remain
processContract: Transform certified UED into EvaluationReportViewModel. Apply all sanitization (mistakeProofText, correctScopeLanguage) exactly once. No renderer may re-sanitize, re-derive scores, re-count criteria, or create recommendations. ViewModel is the single source of truth for all author-facing rendered fields.
outputRequiredFields: titleBlock; overallScore; reportType; genre; criterionDetails; revisionOpportunitySummary
outputMetrics: no forbidden patterns in VM editorial text; all sanitization applied; no renderer-local derivation
backwardKick: S10c_VIEWMODEL_BOUNDARY_GATE for VM/render boundary violations; S10b_PHASE5_AUTHOR_EXPOSURE_GATE for certification failures
dirtyDataRules: renderer-local sanitization detected; renderer-local score derivation detected; renderer-local recommendation creation detected; renderer-local recounting detected
notes: Gate enforced by viewModelBoundaryGate.test.ts (CI-gated). normalizeEvaluationReportViewModel() is the sole owner of mistakeProofText and correctScopeLanguage application. DREAM fields not yet migrated to VM are tracked as TEMPORARY_DREAM_RENDERER_EXCEPTION.

inputMetrics: ownership/auth check; Phase 5 pass; no local recalculation; ViewModel boundary gate pass
processContract: Render webpage from EvaluationReportViewModel only. No sanitization, score derivation, or business logic permitted — formatting only.
outputMetrics: matches PDF/DOCX/TXT fields; no fabricated progress
backwardKick: S10c_VIEWMODEL_BOUNDARY_GATE for VM/render boundary violations; S10b_PHASE5_AUTHOR_EXPOSURE_GATE for certification failures
dirtyDataRules: renderer-local sanitization detected; renderer-local score derivation detected; report type drift; score drift; genre drift; criteria confidence drift
notes: Webpage consumes EvaluationReportViewModel (normalizeEvaluationReportViewModel). All sanitization (mistakeProofText, correctScopeLanguage) has been applied by the ViewModel boundary — renderer performs formatting only. DREAM fields remain as TEMPORARY_DREAM_RENDERER_EXCEPTION until VM migration is complete.

inputMetrics: format supported; download parity passes; ViewModel boundary gate pass
processContract: Render PDF/DOCX/TXT from EvaluationReportViewModel — same canonical ViewModel as webpage. No sanitization, score derivation, or business logic permitted — formatting only.
outputMetrics: evidence byte-for-byte preserved; format render succeeds; parity with webpage
backwardKick: S10c_VIEWMODEL_BOUNDARY_GATE for VM/render boundary violations; S10b_PHASE5_AUTHOR_EXPOSURE_GATE for certification failures
dirtyDataRules: renderer-local sanitization detected; renderer-local score derivation detected; download parity fail; format render fail
notes: PDF/DOCX/TXT downloads consume EvaluationReportViewModel via renderTxtFromViewModel, renderHtmlFromViewModel (PDF), renderDocxFromViewModel. All sanitization applied by ViewModel boundary — renderers perform formatting only. reportRenderParity.ts validates cross-format parity.

inputMetrics: author exposure certification passed; canonical opportunity authority present even when empty; only admitted dispositions supply ledger rows; evaluation evidence available or row remains Needs Targeting; all Ready opportunities traceable by opportunity_id and source location; author exposure DCIP compliance present and passing
processContract: Project admitted canonical opportunities into the Revision Opportunity Ledger without rerunning evaluation, reading report summaries, or manufacturing queue identities. Suppressed and informational recommendation dispositions remain certified lineage only and do not become active or Held work.
outputRequiredFields: quality_manifest; quality_manifest.dcip_compliance; quality_manifest.constitutional_authority_registry; opportunities[].opportunity_id; opportunities[].finding_id; opportunities[].criterion; opportunities[].severity; opportunities[].evidence_anchor; opportunities[].manuscript_coordinates; opportunities[].revision_operation; opportunities[].preflight_status; opportunities[].grounding_status
outputMetrics: ledger row count equals admitted disposition count; zero admitted dispositions produces valid canonical empty authority and zero queue items; no Ready opportunity without evidence_anchor or manuscript_wide_support; finding_id_coverage and evidence_anchor_coverage emitted in quality_manifest; DCIP compliance and constitutional authority status emitted in quality_manifest; Ready vs Needs Targeting classified
dirtyDataRules: canonical authority missing or malformed; ledger row exists without admitted disposition; admitted disposition omitted from ledger; duplicate canonical opportunity identity; missing evidence anchor; vague operation; missing/failing DCIP compliance; missing required constitutional authority
notes: No evaluation evidence equals no Revise Queue item. A governed zero-opportunity result is valid only when canonical authority is present with opportunities: []; missing or malformed authority fails closed. Summary recommendations, report projections, criterion scores, and dispositions alone are never queue authority. Ledger quality manifest includes DCIP compliance and constitutional authority registry status inherited from certified Evaluation context.

supplier: Revision opportunity ledger plus optional revise seed
inputMetrics: ledger may be empty when no evidence-backed opportunities exist; A/B/C are manuscript-ready prose when Ready
processContract: Admit only evidence-backed revision items into the authenticated workbench. Ready items require exact source targeting plus three manuscript-ready A/B/C candidates; incomplete rows remain Needs Targeting.
outputMetrics: Ready and Needs Targeting not mixed; Ready items have exactly three quality-gated A/B/C candidates; A/B/C are materially distinct from one another (no duplicate/near-duplicate options); author decisions persisted
dirtyDataRules: Revise reruns evaluator; A/B/C not prose; generic or malformed candidate prose; duplicate or near-duplicate A/B/C options; Ready row missing source passage; author decision not persisted
notes: Revise is a consume-and-repair surface, not a second evaluator. Queue size is evidence-driven; caps are not targets.
